title: centaurea myriocephala var. schizophylla
intro: Centaurea myriocephala var. schizophylla, also known as a type of knapweed or cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, respiratory problems, and inflammation. The health benefits of Centaurea myriocephala var. schizophylla include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive discomfort. Herbal preparations of Centaurea myriocephala var. schizophylla can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
